channel.title: Tuning Digital
channel.description: Independent reviews of AI & SaaS productivity tools. No vendor bias, no pay-to-rank — just the signal you need to choose the right stack.

item.title: Claude Review (2026)
item.description: Independent Claude review. Most capable AI assistant for long-form work and complex reasoning. Pricing, features, pros, cons, and who it's best for.
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter

item.title: ChatGPT vs Perplexity for Research
item.description: Independent review and comparison: ChatGPT vs Perplexity for Research. Expert analysis, real-world testing, and honest recommendations.
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter

item.title: Notion vs Roam Research (2026): Which Wins?
item.description: Notion vs Roam Research compared after 60 days of daily use. Pricing, features, philosophy, and which knowledge management tool is worth it in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter

item.title: Linear vs Jira vs Asana (2026): Which Wins?
item.description: We tested Linear, Jira, and Asana on real client work for 12 weeks. Which project management tool wins for engineering teams, agencies, and product teams in 2026?
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter

item.title: Cut Your SaaS Stack by 40% (2026 Guide)
item.description: Paying for 5+ SaaS tools that overlap? The exact framework to consolidate your stack and cut hundreds per month — without losing functionality.
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter

item.title: Best AI Writing Tools 2026: Honest Review
item.description: We tested Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini on real writing tasks for 30 days. Honest verdict on which AI writing tool is worth paying for in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Sam Carter
